title: AL's Skeletons Revamped
description: A pack that revamps Skeletons and adds more variants!
body:
![Skeletons Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e8fa43cce25862d25c97d4431c4c4a5cc419f0.png)

# 

A pack that revamps Skeletons and adds more variants by changing the models and textures!

I made this as a more "Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WUuHEOkPho4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The Skeleton design and the Jockey feature are actually heavily inspired by [Mickey Joe's Barely Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default) so go check out his pack!

 

 

This pack adds things like Biome variants, Enchantment-dependent quivers, Skeleton Jockey variants, and more! 

 

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
